title: gilia aggregata var. candida
intro: Gilia aggregata var. candida, also known as white gilia or white gilia aggie, is a rare and endangered perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Gilia aggregata var. candida is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and remedies.
